activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the weather ___, we'll eat outside. (improve)
activities.explanation: Después de «if» usamos presente simple; «weather» es singular, por eso corresponde «improves».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: You'll miss the bus if you ___ now. (not leave)
activities.explanation: La condición negativa usa presente simple: «don't leave».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the shop is open, I ___ the cable there. (buy)
activities.explanation: La consecuencia futura se construye con «will buy».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: We won't go for a walk if it ___. (rain)
activities.explanation: La cláusula con «if» lleva presente simple «rains».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If you press this button, the screen ___. (restart)
activities.explanation: El resultado futuro de pulsar el botón es «will restart».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If Mara ___ enough time, she may join the tour. (have)
activities.explanation: La condición usa presente; la tercera persona de «have» es «has».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: You ___ a discount if you book both courses together. (receive)
activities.explanation: La consecuencia prometida se expresa con «will receive».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the alarm ___, use the stairs. (sound)
activities.explanation: La condición usa presente «sounds» y el resultado ya aparece como imperativo.

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the delivery doesn't arrive today, I ___ the supplier. (contact)
activities.explanation: La consecuencia de que no llegue el envío es «will contact».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Unless the traffic is heavy, we ___ there before six. (be)
activities.explanation: «Unless» presenta la condición y la llegada futura usa «will be».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: We might postpone the launch if the final tests ___. (fail)
activities.explanation: El sujeto plural «tests» lleva el presente «fail» después de «if».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If you ___ the receipt, the shop may offer an exchange. (keep)
activities.explanation: La condición posible usa presente «keep»; «may offer» ya expresa el resultado.

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If Leo ___ the earlier train, he should reach us by noon. (catch)
activities.explanation: La tercera persona de «catch» añade «-es»: «catches».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: You won't see the full menu unless you ___ down. (scroll)
activities.explanation: «Unless you scroll» equivale a «if you don't scroll».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the room gets too warm, ___ the window. (open)
activities.explanation: La consecuencia es una instrucción, por eso usamos el imperativo «open».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Provided that the figures ___ correct, we'll approve the report. (be)
activities.explanation: «Provided that» funciona como condición y lleva presente «are».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: As long as everyone ___ the rules, the event can continue. (follow)
activities.explanation: «Everyone» es gramaticalmente singular y requiere «follows».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Even if the price ___, I won't replace a working laptop. (fall)
activities.explanation: «Even if» introduce la condición en presente; «price» exige «falls».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the client approves the design, production ___ next week. (start)
activities.explanation: La aprobación es condición y el inicio posterior usa «will start».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If your password ___ too simple, the system may reject it. (be)
activities.explanation: La condición lleva presente «is»; «may reject» expresa una consecuencia posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the evidence ___ consistent, the researchers are likely to continue. (remain)
activities.explanation: «Evidence» es incontable y singular; en presente corresponde «remains».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: Unless both sides ___, the dispute won't end quickly. (compromise)
activities.explanation: El sujeto plural «both sides» usa «compromise» tras «unless».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the backup ___, we should be able to recover every file. (work)
activities.explanation: La condición usa «works»; «should be able to» expresa un resultado esperado.

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If the chairperson ___ to the amendment, we'll hold another vote. (object)
activities.explanation: La tercera persona singular de «object» es «objects» y aparece en presente tras «if».

activities.instructions: Complete the first conditional sentence with the correct form of the verb in brackets.
activities.prompt: If you'll ___ a moment, I'll check whether the manager is free. (wait)
activities.explanation: En esta petición cortés, «will» expresa disposición y va seguido del infinitivo «wait».
